channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Pressure building on Mayor Eric Adams following federal indictment
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Pressure continues to build on Mayor Eric Adams -- with more federal corruption charges possible. On Thursday, the mayor seems to have forced out his schools chancellor sooner than expected, with the governor telling him to make sure he keeps the city running smoothly.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: US arranges flights to bring Americans out of Lebanon as others seek escape
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — U.S.-arranged flights have brought about 250 Americans and their relatives out of Lebanon this week during escalated fighting between Israel and Hezbollah, while thousands of others still there face airstrikes and diminishing commercial flights.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, MATTHEW LEE and JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Photo shows U.S. Rep. Mike Lawler wearing blackface at college Halloween party in 2006
item.description: U.S. Rep. Mike Lawler said he was sorry after the New York Times obtained photos of him wearing blackface about two decades ago at a college Halloween costume party where he dressed as Michael Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Izaguirre, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What's next after prosecutors reveal new evidence in Trump's 2020 election interference case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Special counsel Jack Smith has provided a road map for how prosecutors hope to prove their case charging former President Donald Trump with an illegal scheme to overturn his 2020 election loss — if it ever gets to trial.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: Melania Trump has revealed her support for abortion rights ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir. Her stated position exposes a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Helene brings climate change to forefront of the presidential campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The devastation wrought by Hurricane Helene has brought climate change to the forefront of the presidential campaign after the issue lingered on the margins for months.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Emhoff denies report he slapped ex-girlfriend outside ritzy overseas movie event
item.description: Second gentleman Doug Emhoff denied the veracity of a Daily Mail report in which three unnamed sources accused him of having slapped a former girlfriend during a 2012 trip to the Cannes Film Festival.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Harris campaigns in Wisconsin and Trump in Michigan in battle for 'blue wall' states
item.description: Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris is opening a two-day stay in Wisconsin and Michigan, and Republican candidate Donald Trump will be in Michigan on Thursday as the two candidates grapple for wins in the “blue wall” battleground states, which also include Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Influential prophesizing pastors believe reelecting Trump is a win in the war of angels and demons
item.description: Headliners denounced Democrat Kamala Harris — Trump's campaign rival — as influenced by demons and the spirit of the wicked biblical queen Jezebel.
item.dc:creator: PETER SMITH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How Trump credits an immigration chart for saving his life and what the graphic is missing
item.description: Ever since the assassination attempt at his rally in Pennsylvania, Donald Trump has professed a unique fondness for a bar chart he credits for saving his life. Trump was addressing the crowd in Butler about illegal immigration and reviewing a chart that detailed U.S.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris-Walz campaign kicks off a nationwide effort to reach Native voters
item.description: Tribal leaders from across the country showed their support for the democratic ticket at Mystic Lake Event Center in Prior Lake on Wednesday. Native American civic leaders say the Harris-Walz campaign is prepared to support issues that impact Indigenous communities.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Olson, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz to introduce bill cutting off federal aid to groups helping illegal immigrants enter US
item.description: Rep. Matt Gaetz, R-Fla., is expected to introduce a bill Thursday that would cut off federal assistance to any organization giving aid to illegal immigrants crossing into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ranked choice voting is on the ballot in several states
item.description: Ranked choice voting could be coming to states like Colorado, Nevada and Oregon. Here's what to know.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Melania Trump in new memoir calls abortion a 'woman's fundamental right': Report
item.description: “Why should anyone other than the woman herself have the power to determine what she does with her own body?" asks the former first lady.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Minneapolis grants consent for Blue Line extension through city’s north side
item.description: The Minneapolis City Council signed off Wednesday on the proposed route of a light rail line that will run through a section of the city’s north side. However, some council members said they could only get to a yes vote after some of their concerns with the route were addressed.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Judge unseals new Trump Jan. 6 election interference evidence
item.description: Prosecutors provided the most detailed look yet at their election interference case against former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson and Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Election forecaster shifts Bacon district in Nebraska toward Democrat
item.description: The election forecaster Sabato’s Crystal Ball announced Monday it shifted Rep. Don Bacon’s (R-Neb.) race in Nebraska toward the Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Photos: As Jimmy Carter celebrates his 100th birthday, a look through the decades
item.description: Former President Jimmy Carter is turning 100. Here are images from notable events or parts of his life, both during his presidency and after.
item.dc:creator: James Doubek, MPR News

item.title: Vance and Walz are both veterans. Here's what it means to have a vet VP
item.description: For the first time since 1996, both major parties have picked a veteran for vice president — a fact that some veterans' groups are hoping it leads to greater understanding of military and vet issues.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence, MPR News

item.title: How young Republicans and Democrats are whipping up votes in key districts
item.description: As the presidential race ramps up in Georgia, one vital voting demographic is mobilizing and hoping to impact the race: young people.
item.dc:creator: Mary Louise Kelly, Erika Ryan, Kira Wakeam, and Courtney Dorning, MPR News

item.title: A century of Jimmy Carter: Longest-living former president turns 100
item.description: In 1998, at the ripe age of 74, former President Carter put some of his thoughts about getting older to paper. "The virtues of aging," Carter wrote in a book that year, "include both the blessings that come to us as we grow older and what we have to offer that might be beneficial to others.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump tosses chicken tenders into crowd at college football game
item.description: Former President Donald Trump surprised college students on Saturday in Alabama with an unusual gift for football fans.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here are the rules for the Vance-Walz CBS debate
item.description: The debate, which will kick off at 9 p.m. EDT on Tuesday from the network’s New York office, will be moderated by CBS anchor Norah O’Donnell and "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Here are the rules for the Vance-Walz debate
item.description: The debate, which will kick off at 9 p.m. EDT on Tuesday from the network’s New York office, will be moderated by CBS anchor Norah O’Donnell and "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump tops Harris by 6 points in Arizona: Survey
item.description: The new USA TODAY/Suffolk University survey found Trump leads the vice president, 48 percent to 42 percent, in the Grand Canyon State.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5
